frameworks.name: signal detection combined with reinforcement learning
frameworks.one_line: choice value is the product of sensory confidence and learned reward value

frameworks.name: reward prediction error coding by dopamine
frameworks.one_line: post-outcome dopamine RPEs are graded by sensory confidence

frameworks.name: prefrontal value computation
frameworks.one_line: medial prefrontal cortex carries pre-outcome confidence-weighted predicted value

core_question: How do animals combine sensory confidence with learned reward value to guide choices and learning?
key_assumptions: predicted value of chosen option equals sensory confidence times learned value
confidence and value combine multiplicatively in a single decision variable
past confidence influences current choice beyond present confidence and past rewards
manipulations: visual stimulus contrast or signal strength to vary sensory confidence
optogenetic inactivation of medial prefrontal cortex before outcome
perturbation of dopamine neurons around outcome
key_findings: choices depend on present confidence, past rewards, and past confidence
midbrain dopamine and mPFC neurons encode confidence-weighted predicted value pre-outcome
inactivating mPFC before outcome strengthens learning from that outcome
post-outcome dopamine encodes confidence-graded RPE that shapes future choices
interpretations: mPFC pre-outcome value signal causally gates how much is learned from outcomes
dopamine post-outcome confidence-graded RPE causally guides subsequent choices
